steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: The correspondence is A to D, B to E, and C to F. Therefore, side AB corresponds to side DE, and side BC corresponds to side EF.

steps.title: Scale the corresponding side
steps.content:
Apply the same scale factor to the side corresponding to BC:
$$EF=30\cdot \frac{4}{3}=40$$

steps.title: Select the matching length
steps.content: The length of side EF is $40$, which appears in the choices. The answer is C.
